title: Phantom Elytra WIngs
description: Phantom-themed Elytra texture that replaces the default design with dark, creature-like wings inspired by the Phantom, including custom item and broken textures.
body:
![OVERVIEW](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e9032ee9b3fb90c8787f2d6a557b2308df8b24c.png)
This resource pack for Minecraft reimagines the Elytra with a Phantom-inspired design, offering a darker and more immersive visual experience. It integrates seamlessly with the game’s aesthetic while adding a subtle thematic enhancement to aerial gameplay.
![FEATURES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/128559824021b804130a3332532924ca13b54bc3.png)
- Redesigned Elytra with a Phantom-inspired appearance
- Custom textures for both equipped and inventory models
- Unique texture for damaged (broken) Elytra
- Cohesive dark-themed visual style
- Compatible with recent Minecraft versions
